name: @canton-vc/adapter-sumsub
description: Sumsub KYC provider adapter for canton-vc. Wraps Sumsub's applicants API with per-request HMAC authentication (X-App-Access-Sig over ts+method+path+body) and the multi-algorithm webhook digest scheme (X-Payload-Digest), behind the vendor-agnostic KycProvider interface. Second production reference adapter alongside @canton-vc/adapter-didit; the two cover token-auth and per-request HMAC patterns most KYC vendors use.
author: Abdullah Faruk Özden <abdullahfarukozden@gmail.com> (https://github.com/Farukest)
